data.title: U.S. President Donald Trump Safe After Security Incident at White House Correspondents' Dinner
data.description: U.S. President Donald Trump was confirmed to be safe following a security incident at the White House Correspondents' Dinner. According to NS3.AI, the event will proceed as planned despite the occurrence. Further details on the nature of the incident have not been disclosed.

data.title: Aave Launches DeFi United Rescue Plan Amid rsETH Incident
data.description:
Aave has initiated a rescue plan called DeFi United in response to the rsETH incident. According to ChainCatcher, the initiative is led by Aave founder Stani Kulechov and seeks community donations in ETH through public fundraising.

Recent data reveals that DeFi United has successfully raised over 100,000 ETH, with more than 85,000 addresses participating.

data.title: Aave has launched a DeFi United rescue plan, raising over 100,000 ETH.
data.description: In response to the rsETH incident on April 18th, Aave launched a rescue plan called DeFi United, spearheaded by Aave founder Stani Kulechov. This plan called for community donations of ETH through a public fundraising campaign. Latest data shows that DeFi United has raised over 100,000 ETH, worth over $232 million, with over 85,000 addresses participating.

data.title: Planet Morning News
data.description:
1. A shooting occurred at the White House Correspondents' Dinner; the gunman died, but Trump is "safe and sound."
2. Iranian Deputy Speaker: Mojtaba ordered that the Strait of Hormuz must not return to its pre-war state.
3. Aave founder: Sufficient recovery funds have been raised to fully fill the rsETH deficit.
4. The US military stated that it will continue to impose a complete blockade on ships entering and leaving Iranian ports.
5. An entity transferred 34.61 million ASTER tokens to Aster in the early morning, worth $22.94 million.
6. Trump: Cryptocurrency is a "huge industry."
7. Litecoin disclosed a zero-day vulnerability that triggered a DoS attack and abnormal MWEB transactions; the vulnerability was fixed after a block reorganization.
8. Polymarket's probability of a "permanent peace agreement between the US and Iran before April 30" is only 4%, and the cryptocurrency fell 7% in 24 hours.
9. Balancer attackers have exchanged 21,000 ETH for 617.43 BTC in the past three days.
10. RookieXBT's associated wallet spent 25,000 USDC to buy 1.89 million SPIKE tokens.

data.title: White House Correspondents' Dinner Set to Resume with Trump Expected to Attend
data.description: The White House Correspondents' Dinner is anticipated to resume soon, with further details to be shared shortly. According to Foresight News, the event's host has confirmed that U.S. President Donald Trump is expected to return to the event and deliver a speech.

data.title: Trump insists on returning to the White House Correspondents' Association Dinner.
data.description: According to Fox News: President Trump and First Lady Melania Trump will return to the White House Correspondents' Association Dinner after being urgently escorted from the Washington Hilton Hotel's ballroom. It is understood that the U.S. Secret Service did not want Trump to return to the dinner, but he insisted. Reporters at the White House Correspondents' Association Dinner stated that a "security incident" occurred that evening, and a suspect has been arrested. According to U.S. media reports, gunshots were heard during President Trump's attendance at the White House Correspondents' Association Dinner, and Trump subsequently left under security escort. (Jin Shi)

data.title: Trump: I suggest continuing the speech, but I will fully comply with the instructions of law enforcement.
data.description: Trump stated that the Secret Service and law enforcement did an excellent job. They responded quickly and bravely. The gunman has been apprehended, and I advised us to "continue the speeches," but fully comply with law enforcement instructions. They (the dinner staff) will make a decision soon. Whatever that decision is, tonight's event will be very different from what was planned, and we'll have to do it all over again. (Jinshi)

data.title: Trump is "safe and sound," and the White House Correspondents' Association Dinner will continue.
data.description: Despite a security incident at the White House Correspondents' Association Dinner, US President Trump is safe and sound, and the dinner will continue. (Xinhua)

data.title: BlackRock's IBIT options open interest surpasses Deribit's for the first time, accelerating the institutionalization of Bitcoin.
data.description: BlackRock's Bitcoin spot ETF, IBIT, saw its open interest in options rise to $27.61 billion on Friday, surpassing Deribit's Bitcoin options market of $26.9 billion for the first time. According to Volmex data, IBIT call option positions primarily bet on a short-term Bitcoin price increase to $109,709, about 41% higher than the current level of approximately $77,400; while the Deribit market primarily anticipates Bitcoin to rise to approximately $106,000. Meanwhile, IBIT options have an average expiration date about two months longer than Deribit options, indicating that investors in the regulated US market are more inclined to hold long-term and have stronger bullish sentiment, further highlighting the accelerating institutionalization trend in the Bitcoin market. (CoinDesk)

data.title: Balancer Attacker Converts Ethereum to Bitcoin Amid Potential Further Sales
data.description: According to ChainCatcher, Onchain Lens has reported that the attacker responsible for the Balancer exploit has converted 21,000 ETH into 617.43 BTC over the past three days. The value of this transaction is approximately $48.72 million. The attacker still holds 1,000 ETH, valued at $2.32 million, and may continue to sell off these assets.

data.title: Trump is expected to return to the White House Correspondents' Dinner as scheduled and deliver a speech.
data.description: Market news: The White House Correspondents' Dinner host stated that the event will resume soon, and more details will be shared shortly. Trump is expected to return to the event as scheduled and deliver a speech. Sources say that neither Trump nor Vice President Vance were injured in the shooting incident at the White House Correspondents' Dinner. (Jinshi)

data.title: Shooting Incident at White House Correspondents' Dinner Hall
data.description: A shooting occurred at the White House Correspondents' Dinner hall, resulting in the death of the gunman. According to Odaily, the incident took place during the event attended by journalists and officials. Further details about the circumstances of the shooting have not been disclosed.

data.title: Aave Announces Recovery Fund for rsETH Asset Support
data.description: Aave has announced that its ecosystem partners and service providers will establish a recovery fund aimed at restoring full asset support for rsETH. According to Odaily, this initiative considers pending Aave DAO governance votes, including those from Arbitrum, indicative protocols, and subsequent successful executions. Aave has reached an agreement with KelpDAO and LayerZero on the technical steps required for implementing the recovery plan. Efforts are underway to address issues faced by affected users and maintain broader DeFi ecosystem stability. The final recovery plan, user operation steps, and further updates will be released soon.

data.title: A shooting occurred at a White House correspondents' dinner; the gunman died.
data.description: A shooting occurred in the White House Correspondents' Dinner room; the gunman is now dead. (CCTV News)

data.title: U.S. President Trump and First Lady Melania Evacuated from White House Correspondents' Dinner
data.description: U.S. President Donald Trump and First Lady Melania Trump arrived at the White House Correspondents' Dinner. According to Odaily, they were subsequently evacuated by their security personnel from the event.

data.title: Litecoin Addresses Zero-Day Vulnerability Leading to DoS Attack
data.description: Litecoin recently revealed a zero-day vulnerability that resulted in a denial-of-service (DoS) attack. According to PANews, the issue has been resolved, ensuring the security of the network. The vulnerability had allowed attackers to exploit the system, causing disruptions. The Litecoin team acted swiftly to address the problem and restore normal operations. Users are advised to update their systems to the latest version to prevent any further issues.

data.title: U.S. Military Continues Blockade of Iranian Ports Amid Rising Tensions
data.description: The U.S. military has announced its ongoing blockade of vessels entering and leaving Iranian ports, following the redirection of 37 ships since the blockade's initiation. According to NS3.AI, U.S. Central Command reported that the USS Pinkney deployed an armed helicopter in the Arabian Sea to intercept a merchant vessel, which subsequently returned to Iran under the escort of a U.S. warship. U.S. President Donald Trump stated on April 13 that the blockade commenced at 10:00 AM Eastern Time on that day. In response, Iran has condemned the action as an act of war, asserting that it breaches the existing ceasefire agreement.

data.title: Aave Founder Announces Recovery Funds to Address rsETH Shortfall
data.description: Aave founder Stani Kulechov has announced that sufficient recovery funds have been raised to address the rsETH shortfall. According to NS3.AI, Kulechov emphasized that the resolution of the issue is contingent upon pending votes, indicative protocols, and successful execution of the recovery plan.

data.title: Significant ASTER Transfer Leads to Price Drop
data.description: A substantial transfer of ASTER tokens has led to a notable price decline. According to ChainCatcher, blockchain analyst Yu Jin reported that an entity, which withdrew 50.1 million ASTER tokens from Aster last September, transferred 34.61 million ASTER tokens back to Aster early today. This movement caused the ASTER price to drop by 5%, from $0.66 to $0.63. The entity's on-chain address still holds 24.25 million ASTER tokens.

data.title: Polymarket's probability of a permanent peace agreement between the US and Iran by April 30th is only 4%, and the market has fallen 7% in the last 24 hours.
data.description: According to Odaily Seer, the probability of a permanent peace agreement between the US and Iran by April 30th on Polymarket is only 4%, down 7% in the last 24 hours. The total trading volume of contracts for this event has exceeded $54 million. The contract rules state that if Iran and the US reach a permanent peace agreement by the specified date (11:59 PM Eastern Time), the market will mark it as "yes"; otherwise, it will mark it as "no." A permanent peace agreement is any agreement that explicitly states that military hostilities between the US and Iran have ended or will permanently cease, or uses similar wording to explicitly state that military hostilities between the US and Iran will permanently end. Agreements that are explicitly temporary or do not contain a final agreement that permanently ends military hostilities between the US and Iran (e.g., a temporary extension of the two-week ceasefire agreement announced on April 7, 2026) do not qualify. The market's primary source of information is official information from the US and Iranian governments; however, other credible reports can also be consulted. US President Trump previously stated that he wouldn't bother going to Pakistan just to get a worthless deal from Iran. Odaily Seer, the prediction channel, continuously monitors the prediction market, seeing changes before pricing.
